# Gotham City Jewelers — Project Brief
**Generated by** `website-design-pro-react`  
**Client contact:** Anthony LaBarca · +1 917 757 0314 · sales@gothamcityjewelers.com  
**Address:** 23 West 47th Street, Suite 402, New York, NY 10036  
**Date:** 2026-05-26

---

## Scroll Story Arc
Visitor arrives thinking "watch dealer" → discovers Gotham City Jewelers as a different kind of authority — custom rings, NYC-born, obsessive about precision — and leaves ready to begin a diamond consultation.

## Hero Moment
The hero video (diamond ring rotating on black marble) plays frame-by-frame as you scroll — the full rotation completes exactly as the headline finishes its SplitText character reveal. The city holds its breath.

---

## Pages Built

| Route | Page Name | Description |
|-------|-----------|-------------|
| `/` | The House | 8-scene full home — video scrub hero, horizontal categories, trust marquee, ring CTA, watch video, brand logos, sell/trade, city close |
| `/ring-builder` | The Ring Studio | Hero + 3-step horizontal process scroll + consultation CTA |
| `/custom-jewelry` | The Atelier | Hero + 3-phase alternating craft grid + inquiry form |
| `/timepieces` | The Vault | Watch video scrub hero + brand horizontal scroll + watch grid + sell/trade exchange |

---

## Scenes Per Page

### Home (`/`)
1. **The Threshold** — `hero-video.mp4` scroll-scrubbed (pinned 300vh), SplitText headline, magnetic CTAs
2. **The Declaration** — 3-panel horizontal scroll (pinned) — Ring Builder / Atelier / Vault
3. **The Strip** — Gold (#C5A46E) trust marquee — CSS infinite scroll
4. **The Ring Moment** — `hero-image.png` pinned CTA (150vh), scale + stagger reveal
5. **The Craft** — `watch-movement-video.mp4` scrubbed (pinned 200vh), overlaid copy
6. **The Houses** — Brand logo CSS marquee with watch image cards
7. **The Exchange** — Sell/Trade + Source split-grid with ScrollReveal
8. **The City** — Parallax `gotham-newyork.jpg`, address + contact CTA

### Ring Builder (`/ring-builder`)
1. **Studio Hero** — `macro-diamond.png` full-bleed, parallax scroll, SplitText
2. **The Process** — 3-step horizontal scroll (pinned) — Choose Stone / Design Setting / Begin
3. **The Invitation** — `macro-diamond.png` parallax CTA + contact links

### Custom Jewelry (`/custom-jewelry`)
1. **Atelier Hero** — `lifestyle-image.png` full-bleed, parallax, SplitText
2. **The Craft** — 3-phase alternating grid (Discovery / Design / Creation)
3. **Begin** — Split layout: copy + functional inquiry form (email fallback wired)

### Timepieces (`/timepieces`)
1. **The Vault Hero** — `watch-movement-video.mp4` scrubbed (250vh), SplitText
2. **The Houses** — 5-brand horizontal scroll (pinned) — Rolex / AP / Patek / Cartier / RM
3. **Featured Watches** — 6-watch 3-col grid with hover price-on-request reveal
4. **The Exchange** — Sell/Trade parallax section with 3-step process

## Design System

```
Colors:
  Void:     #080808     — background (hero, footer, main sections)
  Dark:     #111110     — raised sections
  Gold:     #C5A46E     — all CTAs, labels, accents (--c-accent)
  Text:     #EDE8E0     — body copy
  Muted:    rgba(237,232,224,0.45)

Typography:
  Display:  Cormorant Garamond — all headlines, hero type
  Body:     Inter — labels, body, CTAs
  Hero size: clamp(64px, 8vw, 140px)

Motion:
  Scroll engine: Lenis 1.x + GSAP ScrollTrigger
  Component layer: Framer Motion (spring physics)
  Video scrub: GSAP ScrollTrigger onUpdate → video.currentTime
  Horizontal scroll: GSAP x-tween + pin
  Hero split: GSAP char stagger, 0.025s per char
  Magnetic CTA: Framer spring stiffness 150 / damping 15
```

---

## Client Must Replace / Confirm

### Critical (before going live)
- [ ] **Ring builder integration** — Jewel X software integration (currently showing consultation CTA placeholder). Update `/ring-builder` Scene 3 when Jewel X goes live.
- [ ] **Watch inventory** — 6 featured watches are from old site scrape. Replace with real current stock. Update `WATCHES` array in `src/pages/Timepieces.tsx`
- [ ] **Watch pricing / availability** — All currently show "Price on Request" — verify this is correct. Add actual prices if desired.
- [ ] **Logo image** — `gotham-logo.png` is currently inverted with CSS to white. If the logo has proper transparent/white version, remove the `filter: brightness(0) invert(1)` from Nav.tsx
- [ ] **Contact form** — The Custom Jewelry inquiry form currently uses `mailto:` fallback. Wire to real backend / Klaviyo / CRM when ready.

### Copy to verify
- [ ] Business hours (currently Mon–Fri 9am–5pm as per onboarding form)
- [ ] Phone number: +1 917 757 0314 ← confirm still current
- [ ] Email: sales@gothamcityjewelers.com ← confirm still current
- [ ] Address: 23 West 47th Street, Suite 402 ← confirm suite number

### Images to upgrade when available
- [ ] **Engagement ring photography** — Replace `hero-image.png` (Higgsfield) with real product photography when client shoots
- [ ] **Lifestyle photography** — Replace `lifestyle-image.png` (Higgsfield) with real lifestyle shots
- [ ] **Custom jewelry renders** — Client mentioned 3DM/STL files and custom renders — add to Custom Jewelry page
- [ ] **Diamond macro** — Replace `macro-diamond.png` (Higgsfield) with real macro studio shots

### Navigation
- [ ] **Sell/Trade page** — Currently links to `/timepieces`. Consider dedicated `/sell-trade` route when copy is ready.
- [ ] **Social links** — Instagram: `instagram.com/gothamcityjewelers` (in Footer.tsx). Add Facebook URL when confirmed.

---

## Run Instructions

```bash
# From project root
npm install        # already done
npm run dev        # → http://localhost:5173
npm run build      # → /dist (ready to deploy)
npm run preview    # preview the /dist build locally
```

**All 4 pages navigate correctly:**
- `http://localhost:5173/`               → Home (8 scenes)
- `http://localhost:5173/ring-builder`   → Ring Studio (3 scenes)
- `http://localhost:5173/custom-jewelry` → The Atelier (3 scenes)
- `http://localhost:5173/timepieces`     → The Vault (4 scenes)

**To view:** scroll slowly. Most scenes are pinned (they stay fixed while you scroll through them). The hero videos respond directly to your scroll position — scrub back and forth.

---

## Technical Notes

- Build size: ~543KB gzipped 173KB — heavy due to GSAP + Framer Motion. Normal for this stack.
- Mobile: Not optimized (separate engagement per brief scope).
- E-commerce: Not wired (Shopify integration is separate from this design showcase).
- Deployment: Drop `/dist` to any static host (Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages).
- Fonts: Loaded from Google Fonts CDN (Cormorant Garamond + Inter). Cache after first load.
